description: Redirects structural code searches from Grep to ast-grep

hooks.prompt:
If the Grep pattern targets code structure (function/class/method/import/type definitions, declarations, or calls), block in favor of ast-grep. If it targets plain text (strings, comments, TODOs, URLs, error messages) or is ambiguous, approve.

Respond ONLY with JSON: {"decision":"block","reason":"..."} or {"decision":"approve"}
